word: G5383 - φιλοπρωτεύω - philoprōteúō - fil-op-rote-yoo'-o - Love to have the preeminence

sections.paragraph:
- Original: φιλοπρωτεύω

- Transliteration: Philoproteuo

- Phonetic: fil-op-rote-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to aspire to pre-eminence, to desire to be first

- Origin: from a compound of G5384 and G4413

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a compound of G5384 and G4413; to be fond of being first that is ambitious of distinction: - love to have the preeminence.
